text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇵🇰 The Israeli Prime Minister's Office and Foreign Affairs Minister Gideon Sa'ar strongly condemned the Pakistani Defence Minister's social media post describing Israel as "cancerous," labeling the remarks as antisemitic blood libels and an intolerable call for the nation's annihilation. The Prime Minister Office's firmly rejected Pakistan's credibility as a neutral peace mediator in light of the hostile rhetoric. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇵🇰 以色列总理办公室和外交部长吉德翁·萨尔强烈谴责巴基斯坦国防部长在社交媒体上将以色列描述为“癌细胞”的言论，称这些言论是反犹太主义的血腥诽谤，是令人无法容忍的灭国呼吁。鉴于这种敌对言论，总理办公室坚决拒绝承认巴基斯坦作为中立和平调解人的可信度。 @wfwitness

text: Cuba's President Miguel Díaz-Canel: Concept of stepping down is not a part of our vocabulary.
text_zh: 古巴总统米格尔·迪亚斯-卡内尔：辞职的概念不在我们的词汇中。

text: Netanyahu’s Office: Pakistan Defence Minister’s call for Israel’s annihilation is outrageous. This is not a statement that can be tolerated from any government, especially not from one that claims to be a neutral arbiter for peace.
text_zh: 内塔尼亚胡办公室：巴基斯坦国防部长呼吁消灭以色列的行为令人愤慨。任何政府，尤其是声称自己是中立和平仲裁者的政府，都不能容忍这种声明。

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. President Trump attacked former allies in a TruthSocial post for criticizing the conflict with Iran, calling them low IQ. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国总统特朗普在TruthSocial上发文抨击前盟友批评与伊朗的冲突，称他们智商低。 @wfwitness

text: A large group of chimpanzees in Uganda’s Kibale National Park split into two rival factions, sparking a deadly conflict, according to a study in Science. The group—once about 200 strong—lived cooperatively for decades, but began dividing around 2015 after key social males died and a new alpha rose to power. By 2018, the split was complete, with no remaining social ties. The two groups then turned violent. The smaller faction launched coordinated attacks, killing adult males and later targeting infants. At least 24 chimpanzees have died so far, though the true number is likely higher. The violence is still ongoing. Source: WSJ
text_zh: 据《科学》杂志的一项研究，乌干达基巴莱国家公园的一大群黑猩猩分裂成两个敌对派系，引发了致命冲突。这个曾经拥有约200只黑猩猩的群体几十年来一直合作生活，但在2015年左右，随着关键的社会性雄性死亡和新的阿尔法雄性掌权，群体开始分裂。到2018年，分裂彻底完成，社会联系荡然无存。随后，这两个群体开始诉诸暴力。较小的派系发动了协同攻击，杀死了成年雄性，后来又以幼崽为目标。到目前为止，至少有24只黑猩猩死亡，实际数字可能更高。暴力仍在持续。来源：华尔街日报

text: 🇺🇸 ⚔️ 🇮🇷 Donald Trump must be so tired of winning. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 ⚔️ 🇮🇷 唐纳德·特朗普一定对胜利感到厌倦了。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: The Spectator Index If the ceasefire marks the end of the war, then 'the biggest loser will be Donald Trump' as the conflict has 'set back his chief war aims and revealed the shallowness of his vision for a new way of wielding American power', according to report in The Economist. https://twitter.com/spectatorindex/status/2042344603135984071/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 《旁观者指数》：据《经济学人》报道，如果停火标志着战争的结束，那么“最大的输家将是唐纳德·特朗普”，因为这场冲突“阻碍了他的主要战争目标，并揭示了他对行使美国权力新方式的愿景的肤浅”。 https://twitter.com/spectatorindex/status/2042344603135984071/photo/1 推文

text: WarMonitor As far as I know, the U.S. hasn’t released the names of the F-15 crew shot down over Iran and later rescued, with officials only identifying them by role. tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor：据我所知，美国尚未公布在伊朗上空被击落并随后获救的F-15机组人员名单，官员们仅按职务确认了他们的身份。 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to OSINT Open Source Intel President Trump just went all out on Tucker, Megyn, Candace, Alex Jones and Marjorie Taylor Greene “Low IQs.” “Third-rate podcasts.” “Losers” and for MTG “traitor” and “nasty.” President Trump: I know why Tucker Carlson, Megyn Kelly, Candace Owens, and Alex Jones have all been fighting me for years, especially by the fact that they think it is wonderful for Iran, the Number One State Sponsor of Terror, to have a Nuclear Weapon - Because they have one thing in common, Low IQs. They’re stupid people, they know it, their families know it, and everyone else knows it, too! Look at their past, look at their record. They don’t have what it takes, and they never did! They’ve all been thrown off Television, lost their Shows, and aren’t even invited on TV because nobody cares about them, they’re NUT JOBS, TROUBLEMAKERS, and will say anything necessary for some “free” and cheap publicity. Now they think they get some “clicks” because they have Third Rate Podcasts, but nobody’s talking about them, and their views are the opposite of MAGA — Or I wouldn’t have won the Presidential Election in a LANDSLIDE. MAGA agrees with me, and just gave CNN a 100% Approval Rating of “TRUMP,” not Hand Flailing Fools like Tucker Carlson, who couldn’t even finish College, he was a broken man when he got fired from Fox, and he’s never been the same — Perhaps he should see a good psychiatrist! Or Megyn Kelly, who nastily asked me the now famous, “Only Rosie O’Donnell,” question, or “Crazy” Candace Owens, who accuses the Highly Respected First Lady of France of being a man, when she is not, and will hopefully win lots of money in the ongoing lawsuit. Actually, to me, the First Lady of France is a far more beautiful woman than Candace, in fact, it’s not even close! Or Bankrupt Alex Jones, who says some of the dumbest things, and lost his entire fortune, as he should have, for his horrendous attack on the families of the Sandy Hook shooting victims, ridiculously claiming it was a hoax. These so-called “pundits” are LOSERS, and they always will be! Now Fake News CNN, The Failing New York Times, and all of the other Radical Left “News” Organizations, are “hailing” them, and giving them “positive” press for the first time in their lives. They’re not “MAGA,” they’re losers, just trying to latch on to MAGA. As President, I could get them on my side anytime I want to, but when they call, I don’t return their calls because I’m too busy on World and Country Affairs and, after a few times, they go “nasty,” just like Marjorie “Traitor” Brown, but I no longer care about that stuff, I only care about doing right for our Country. MAGA is about WINNING and STRENGTH in not allowing Iran to have Nuclear Weapons. MAGA is about MAKING AMERICA GREAT AGAIN, and these people have no idea how to do that, BUT I DO, because THE UNITED STATES IS NOW THE “HOTTEST” COUNTRY ANYWHERE IN THE WORLD! - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 OSINT Open Source Intel：特朗普总统刚刚全力抨击了塔克、梅根、坎迪斯、亚历克斯·琼斯和玛乔丽·泰勒·格林，“低智商”。“三流播客”。“失败者”，对于MTG则是“叛徒”和“讨厌鬼”。特朗普总统：我知道为什么塔克·卡尔森、梅根·凯利、坎迪斯·欧文斯和亚历克斯·琼斯多年来一直与我作对，特别是他们认为让头号恐怖主义支持国伊朗拥有核武器是一件美妙的事情——因为他们有一个共同点，那就是低智商。他们是愚蠢的人，他们自己知道，他们的家人知道，其他人也都知道！看看他们的过去，看看他们的记录。他们没有成功所需的素质，而且从来都没有！他们都被赶出了电视圈，失去了节目，甚至没被邀请上电视，因为没人关心他们，他们是疯子、麻烦制造者，为了“免费”和廉价的宣传，什么话都说得出来。现在他们以为自己因为有三流播客而获得了一些“点击量”，但没人谈论他们，他们的观点与MAGA背道而驰——否则我就不会以压倒性优势赢得总统大选。MAGA同意我的观点，刚刚给了CNN 100%的“特朗普”支持率，而不是像塔克·卡尔森那样挥舞双手的傻瓜，他连大学都没读完，被福克斯解雇时他是个破碎的人，他再也没变回来——也许他应该去看个好精神科医生！或者梅根·凯利，她讨厌地问了我那个现在很有名的“只有罗西·奥唐纳”的问题，或者“疯狂的”坎迪斯·欧文斯，她指责受人尊敬的法国第一夫人是男人，而事实并非如此，希望她能在正在进行的诉讼中赢得大笔钱。事实上，对我来说，法国第一夫人比坎迪斯漂亮得多，事实上，根本没法比！或者破产的亚历克斯·琼斯，他说了一些最愚蠢的话，并失去了他所有的财产，这是他应得的，因为他对比桑迪胡克小学枪击案受害者家属进行了可怕的攻击，荒谬地声称这是一场骗局。这些所谓的“权威人士”是失败者，他们永远都是！现在假新闻CNN、《失败的纽约时报》以及所有其他激进左翼“新闻”机构都在“欢呼”他们，并有生以来第一次给他们“正面”报道。他们不是“MAGA”，他们是失败者，只是想依附于MAGA。作为总统，我随时都可以让他们站在我这边，但当他们打电话时，我不回电话，因为我忙于世界和国家事务，几次之后，他们就变得“讨厌”了，就像玛乔丽“叛徒”布朗一样，但我不再关心那些东西了，我只关心为我们的国家做正确的事。MAGA意味着胜利和力量，不允许伊朗拥有核武器。MAGA意味着让美国再次伟大，而这些人根本不知道该怎么做，但我知道，因为美国现在是世界上任何地方“最热门”的国家！ - Open Source Intel 推文

text: Open Source Intel Trump: “Crazy” Candace Owens, who accuses the Highly Respected First Lady of France of being a man, when she is not, and will hopefully win lots of money in the ongoing lawsuit. Actually, to me, the First Lady of France is a far more beautiful woman than Candace, in fact, it’s not even close! tweet

text: Trump: “Crazy” Candace Owens, who accuses the Highly Respected First Lady of France of being a man, when she is not, and will hopefully win lots of money in the ongoing lawsuit. Actually, to me, the First Lady of France is a far more beautiful woman than Candace, in fact, it’s not even close!

text: Trump lashes out at Tucker Carlson, Megyn Kelly, Candace Owens, and Alex Jones in a long Truth Social post: They have one thing in common — low IQs. They’re stupid people… everyone knows it.
text_zh: 特朗普在Truth Social的长文中猛烈抨击塔克·卡尔森、梅根·凯利、坎迪斯·欧文斯和亚历克斯·琼斯：他们有一个共同点——低智商。他们是愚蠢的人……每个人都知道。

text: 🇺🇸 "I know why Tucker Carlson, Megyn Kelly, Candace Owens, and Alex Jones have all been fighting me for years, especially by the fact that they think it is wonderful for Iran, the Number One State Sponsor of Terror, to have a Nuclear Weapon - Because they have one thing in common, Low IQs." - The Window Licker crashes out over conservative media personalities. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 “我知道为什么塔克·卡尔森、梅根·凯利、坎迪斯·欧文斯和亚历克斯·琼斯多年来一直与我作对，特别是他们认为让头号恐怖主义支持国伊朗拥有核武器是一件美妙的事情——因为他们有一个共同点，那就是低智商。” - 这位“舔窗者”在保守派媒体名人身上崩溃了。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Trump lashed out at NATO allies in a tense closed-door meeting with Secretary-General Mark Rutte, criticizing their refusal to support the Iran conflict. “It went shit… nothing but a tirade of insults,” one European official said, adding Trump “apparently threatened to do just about anything.” Source: POLITICO

text: A new report from the Yale Humanitarian Research Lab (HRL) says satellite imagery strongly suggests that an Ethiopian military base near Asosa, close to the Sudan border, has been providing logistical support to Sudan’s UAE-backed Rapid Support Forces (RSF) over the past five months. Researchers identified multiple indicators of assistance, including: — Delivery and unloading of pickup-style “technical” vehicles. — On-site installation of heavy weapons mounts. — Presence of personnel not typical of standard Ethiopian military operations. — Vehicle and supply movements that align with RSF offensives in Sudan’s Blue Nile State. The base appears to function as a resupply, refueling, housing, and vehicle modification hub roughly 100 km from the Sudan border, making it strategically positioned for cross-border operations.
text_zh: 耶鲁大学人道主义研究实验室（HRL）的一份新报告称，卫星图像强烈表明，靠近苏丹边境的埃塞俄比亚阿索萨附近的一个军事基地在过去五个月里一直为苏丹阿联酋支持的快速支援部队（RSF）提供后勤支持。研究人员确定了多个援助指标，包括：——交付和卸载皮卡式“技术”车辆。——现场安装重型武器支架。——存在不属于标准埃塞俄比亚军事行动的人员。——车辆和补给移动与RSF在苏丹青尼罗州的攻势一致。该基地似乎是一个距离苏丹边境约100公里的补给、加油、住房和车辆改装中心，使其在战略上适合跨境行动。

text: ↩️ Reply to OSINT Nuno Felix RT @FBILosAngeles : Russian General Staff Main Intelligence Directorate (GRU) cyber actors are exploiting vulnerable routers worldwide to intercept and steal sensitive military, government, and critical infrastructure information. The U.S. Department of Justice and the FBI recently disrupted a GRU network of compromised small-office home-office (SOHO) routers used to facilitate malicious DNS hijacking operations. The FBI and the following partners are releasing this announcement to warn the public and encourage network defenders and device owners to take actions to remediate and reduce the attack surface of similar edge devices: U.S. National Security Agency (NSA) and international partners from Canada, Czech Republic, Denmark, Estonia, Finland, Germany, Italy, Latvia, Lithuania, Norway, Poland, Portugal, Romania, Slovakia, and Ukraine. Understanding the DNS Hijacking Operations Since at least 2024, Russian GRU 85th Main Special Service Center (85th GTsSS) cyber actors — also known as APT28, Fancy Bear, and Forest Blizzard — have been collecting credentials and exploiting vulnerable routers worldwide, including compromising TP-Link routers using CVE-2023-50224. The GRU actors changed the devices' dynamic host configuration protocol (DHCP) / domain name system (DNS) settings to introduce actor-controlled DNS resolvers. Connected devices, including laptops and phones, inherit these modified settings. The actor-controlled infrastructure resolves and captures lookups for all domain names. The GRU provides fraudulent DNS answers for specific domains and services — including Microsoft Outlook Web Access — enabling adversary-in-the-middle (AitM) attacks against encrypted traffic if users navigate through a certificate error warning. These AitM attacks would allow the actors to see the traffic unencrypted. The GRU has harvested passwords, authentication tokens, and sensitive information including emails and web browsing information normally protected by secure socket layer (SSL) and transport layer security (TLS) encryption. The GRU has indiscriminately compromised a wide pool of U.S. and global victims and then filtered down impacted users, especially targeting information related to military, government, and critical infrastructure. Tips to Protect Yourself The FBI and partners have released relevant guidance and technical indicators, including NCSC-UK cybersecurity advisory "APT28 exploit routers to enable DNS hijacking operations" on 7 April 2026 and CISA's Edge Device Security webpage. Users of SOHO routers are encouraged to upgrade end-of-support devices, update to latest firmware versions, change default usernames and passwords, and disable remote management interfaces from the Internet. All users should carefully consider certificate warnings in web browsers and email clients. Organizations that allow remote work should review relevant policies regarding how employees access sensitive data, such as using VPNs and hardened application configurations. Additionally, organizations may consider incentivizing employees to upgrade outdated personal devices involved in remote access. Report It If you suspect you have been targeted or compromised by a Russian GRU cyber intrusion, report the activity to your local FBI field office or file a complaint with the IC3. Be sure to provide details about your router, including device type and DHCP configurations. Visit http://IC3.gov for additional details. tweet
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 OSINT Nuno Felix RT @FBILosAngeles：俄罗斯总参谋部情报总局（GRU）网络行为者正在利用全球易受攻击的路由器来拦截和窃取敏感的军事、政府和关键基础设施信息。美国司法部和联邦调查局最近破坏了一个GRU网络，该网络由受损的小型办公室家庭办公室（SOHO）路由器组成，用于促进恶意DNS劫持操作。联邦调查局和以下合作伙伴正在发布此公告，以警告公众并鼓励网络防御者和设备所有者采取行动，以修复和减少类似边缘设备的攻击面：美国国家安全局（NSA）以及来自加拿大、捷克共和国、丹麦、爱沙尼亚、芬兰、德国、意大利、拉脱维亚、立陶宛、挪威、波兰、葡萄牙、罗马尼亚、斯洛伐克和乌克兰的国际合作伙伴。了解DNS劫持操作：至少自2024年以来，俄罗斯GRU第85主要特种服务中心（85th GTsSS）网络行为者——也称为APT28、Fancy Bear和Forest Blizzard——一直在收集凭据并利用全球易受攻击的路由器，包括利用CVE-2023-50224破坏TP-Link路由器。GRU行为者更改了设备的动态主机配置协议（DHCP）/域名系统（DNS）设置，以引入行为者控制的DNS解析器。包括笔记本电脑和手机在内的连接设备继承了这些修改后的设置。行为者控制的基础设施解析并捕获所有域名的查找。GRU为特定域名和服务（包括Microsoft Outlook Web Access）提供欺诈性DNS答案，如果用户浏览证书错误警告，则能够对加密流量进行对手中间人（AitM）攻击。这些AitM攻击将允许行为者看到未加密的流量。GRU已经收集了密码、身份验证令牌和敏感信息，包括通常受安全套接字层（SSL）和传输层安全（TLS）加密保护的电子邮件和网页浏览信息。GRU不加区别地破坏了大量美国和全球受害者，然后筛选出受影响的用户，特别针对与军事、政府和关键基础设施相关的信息。保护自己的提示：联邦调查局和合作伙伴发布了相关指导和技术指标，包括NCSC-UK网络安全咨询“APT28利用路由器启用DNS劫持操作”（2026年4月7日）和CISA的边缘设备安全网页。鼓励SOHO路由器用户升级支持终止的设备，更新到最新的固件版本，更改默认用户名和密码，并禁用来自互联网的远程管理接口。所有用户都应仔细考虑Web浏览器和电子邮件客户端中的证书警告。允许远程工作的组织应审查有关员工如何访问敏感数据（例如使用VPN和强化应用程序配置）的相关政策。此外，组织可以考虑激励员工升级参与远程访问的过时个人设备。报告它：如果您怀疑自己已成为俄罗斯GRU网络入侵的目标或受到损害，请向当地FBI外地办事处报告该活动或向IC3投诉。请务必提供有关您的路由器的详细信息，包括设备类型和DHCP配置。访问http://IC3.gov了解更多详细信息。 推文

text: 🇸🇦 NEW— Saudi Arabia details attacks on energy facilities - 1 Saudi security worker killed, 7 other Saudis injured. - East-West Pipeline Pumping Station — 700,000 bpd throughput reduction - Manifa Production Facility: 300,000 bpd reduction - Khurais Facility: 300,000 bpd reduction Other infrastructure affected: - SATORP Refinery (Jubail) - Ras Tanura Refinery - SAMREF Refinery (Yanbu) - Riyadh Refinery - Ju’aymah Processing Facilities: Fires affecting LPG & NGL exports ✍ From no impacts to many impacts overnight
text_zh: 🇸🇦 新消息——沙特阿拉伯详细说明了对能源设施的袭击 - 1名沙特安全人员死亡，7名沙特人受伤。 -东西管道泵站——日产量减少70万桶 -马尼法生产设施：日产量减少30万桶 -库赖斯设施：日产量减少30万桶 其他受影响的基础设施： -SATORP炼油厂（朱拜勒） -拉斯塔努拉炼油厂 -SAMREF炼油厂（延布） -利雅得炼油厂 -朱艾马加工设施：火灾影响液化石油气和天然气出口 ✍ 从一夜之间没有影响到产生许多影响

text: Iran prefers dealing with JD Vance because it doesn’t trust previous U.S. negotiators—especially Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner. Source: CBS News
text_zh: 伊朗更喜欢与JD·万斯打交道，因为它不信任以前的美国谈判代表——尤其是史蒂夫·威特科夫和贾里德·库什纳。来源：CBS新闻

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇬🇧🇮🇱🇱🇧British Prime Minister Starmer called Israel's strikes against Lebanon wrong, regardless of they were ceasefire violations. "Well, it's hard to say whether there's a breach when we haven't all got access to all the details of the ceasefire. But look.…" ⚡️ 🇬🇧 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 British Prime Minister Starmer explains under what conditions Britain would join the conflict with Iran. "That's why I've said, and obviously it's caused a degree of criticism and pressure in the last few weeks. I've been saying we are not going to be dragged into this war because I say there must be a lawful basis that matters. If you're gonna commit our service personnel to risk their lives, they need to know they're doing so on a lawful basis. It's not a question of remote international law. These are real people who take risks of their lives on our behalf. They need to know that what they're doing is lawful. I owe them that, and I will never give up on that. Secondly, there must be a viable thought through plan, and absent those two things, then it is not in our national interest to get involved, and we won't." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡🇬🇧🇮🇱🇱🇧英国首相斯塔默称以色列对黎巴嫩的打击是错误的，无论它们是否违反了停火协议。“嗯，很难说是否存在违规，因为我们还没有获得停火的所有细节。但看……” ⚡️ 🇬🇧 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 英国首相斯塔默解释了英国在什么条件下会加入与伊朗的冲突。“这就是为什么我说，显然在过去几周引起了一定程度的批评和压力。我一直说我们不会被拖入这场战争，因为我说必须有合法的依据，这很重要。如果你要让我们的服役人员冒生命危险，他们需要知道他们是在合法的依据下这样做的。这不是一个遥远的国际法问题。这些是真实的人，他们代表我们冒着生命危险。他们需要知道他们所做的是合法的。我欠他们这些，我永远不会放弃这一点。其次，必须有一个可行的、经过深思熟虑的计划，如果缺少这两点，那么参与其中就不符合我们的国家利益，我们也不会参与。” @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇬🇧 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 British Prime Minister Starmer called Israel's strikes against Lebanon wrong, regardless of they were ceasefire violations. "Well, it's hard to say whether there's a breach when we haven't all got access to all the details of the ceasefire. But look. Let's be really clear about it. They're wrong. And they So Israel is wrong to be attacking in Lebanon now? Yes. That shouldn't be happening. That should stop. That's my strong view. And therefore, the question isn't a technical one of whether it's a breach of the agreement or not. The one is actually a matter of principles as far as I'm concerned." @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇬🇧 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 英国首相斯塔默称以色列对黎巴嫩的打击是错误的，无论它们是否违反了停火协议。“嗯，很难说是否存在违规，因为我们还没有获得停火的所有细节。但看。让我们对此非常清楚。它们是错误的。所以以色列现在攻击黎巴嫩是错误的吗？是的。那不应该发生。那应该停止。这是我的强烈观点。因此，问题不是技术上的，即是否违反了协议。在我看来，这实际上是一个原则问题。” @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to Lebanese News and Updates: "❗️Diplomatic sources tell CBS that Trump personally agreed that Lebanon was part of the ceasefire agreement, and Israel also agreed to the terms" Americans, your president is being manhandled and bossed by a foreigner Polish Jew Free yourself. Free the U.S from the hands of Zionism ❗️ CBS: Trump had been told the ceasefire would apply to the Middle East, and he agreed it included Lebanon. Mediators, Iran's foreign minister, and Pakistan's Prime Minister also believed it did. The US position reportedly shifted after a call between Netanyahu and Trump.
text_zh: ↩️ 回复黎巴嫩新闻和更新：“❗️外交消息人士告诉CBS，特朗普亲自同意黎巴嫩是停火协议的一部分，以色列也同意了条款” 美国人，你们的总统正在被一个外国波兰犹太人摆布和指挥。解放你们自己。把美国从犹太复国主义手中解放出来 ❗️ CBS：特朗普被告知停火将适用于中东，他同意它包括黎巴嫩。调解人、伊朗外交部长和巴基斯坦总理也认为它包括。据报道，在美国内塔尼亚胡和特朗普通话后，美国立场发生了转变。

text: A war of narratives now Between the sovereign Iranian ceasefire that saves Lebanon and ends the Israeli aggression after Iranian and Lebanese sacrifices And the Israeli push to frame the ceasefire after this massacre as only possible because Lebanese sat with Israelis for peace and plan to disarm Hezbullah through the Lebanese army Please understand how messed up this is and how traitorous
text_zh: 现在是一场叙事之战，在拯救黎巴嫩并在伊朗和黎巴嫩做出牺牲后结束以色列侵略的主权伊朗停火之间，以及以色列试图将这次大屠杀后的停火描述为只有在黎巴嫩人与以色列人坐下来谈和平并计划通过黎巴嫩军队解除真主党武装才有可能实现。请理解这有多么混乱，多么叛国

text: Trump was initially told that Thursday’s ceasefire would cover the Middle East, including Lebanon—a view shared by mediators, Pakistan’s Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif, and Iran’s Araghchi. However, after a call between Netanyahu and Trump, the U.S. position shifted. Source: CBS News
text_zh: 特朗普最初被告知周四的停火将覆盖中东，包括黎巴嫩——这一观点得到了调解人、巴基斯坦总理夏巴兹·谢里夫和伊朗阿拉格齐的认同。然而，在内塔尼亚胡和特朗普通话后，美国立场发生了转变。来源：CBS新闻

text: ❗️ Diplomatic sources tell CBS that Trump personally agreed that Lebanon was part of the ceasefire agreement, and Israel also agreed to the terms ✍ If implemented, please all Lebanese and especially Shia understand that even though a ceasefire was secured without being forced to peave with Israel..the Lebanese government rejected it so they can fake getting the ceasefire through a direct meeting with the Israelis Please understand what's happening here. Please understand how dangerous what the Lebanese state is doing
text_zh: ❗️ 外交消息人士告诉CBS，特朗普亲自同意黎巴嫩是停火协议的一部分，以色列也同意了条款 ✍ 如果实施，请所有黎巴嫩人，特别是什叶派理解，即使在没有被迫与以色列讲和的情况下获得了停火……黎巴嫩政府拒绝了它，这样他们就可以假装通过与以色列人的直接会面来达成停火。请理解这里发生了什么。请理解黎巴嫩国家正在做的事情有多危险
